headline: Session 45 turned a dormant story-export helper into a source-derived League Story Card while tightening test-shard truth.

items.title: league-story-card-export
items.evidence: Settings now exposes a League Story Card action that downloads a dashboard-derived card with champion, record, awards, leaders, cap, General Manager legacy, best trade, and time-capsule receipts.

items.title: league-story-card-wiring-regression-net
items.evidence: Browser wiring tests now prove the import/button/download path and the new story-export test is assigned to the runtime shard.

items.title: audit-and-innovation-exhaustion
items.evidence: Session 45 audit and innovation-pack follow-through are shipped; genius cache reports 0 open items.

followUps.title: email-forwarding receipt
followUps.evidence: Obtain real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before SPARKED flip.

followUps.title: live-origin/routing proof
followUps.evidence: After deployment, verify playfranchisearchitect.com serves the latest build before launch posture changes.

blockers.title: SPARKED launch evidence
blockers.evidence: Still blocked on on-domain email forwarding/copying proof and current live-origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: wrapper test signals
honestyLedger.evidence: npm test timed out and npm run test:ui returned empty exit 1; direct shards 294/294 and direct Playwright 17/17 are the counted proof.

honestyLedger.title: email-forwarding automation
honestyLedger.evidence: Rejected as phantom work; no local Brevo capability is declared and code cannot fabricate a received-message receipt.

honestyLedger.title: missing closeout helper scripts
honestyLedger.evidence: render-state-vector, compute-entropy, and append-genome-snapshot are not present locally; no fabricated artifacts were produced.

diffStat.suite: direct default shards 294/294; direct Playwright 17/17; Pages build/smoke
